name: update_drive
description: Tool to update the metadata for a shared drive. use when you need to modify properties like the name, theme, background image, or restrictions of a shared drive.

name.description: The new name for the shared drive.

hidden.description: Whether the shared drive is hidden from the default view.

driveId.description: The ID of the shared drive to update.

themeId.description: The ID of a theme to apply to the shared drive. Cannot be set if colorRgb or backgroundImageFile are set.

colorRgb.description: The color of this shared drive as an RGB hex string (e.g., "#FF0000"). Cannot be set if themeId is set.

domainUsersOnly.description: If true, restricts access to users of the domain to which the shared drive belongs.

driveMembersOnly.description: If true, restricts access to items inside the shared drive to its members.

adminManagedRestrictions.description: If true, requires administrative privileges to modify restrictions.

copyRequiresWriterPermission.description: If true, disables copy, print, or download options for readers and commenters.

sharingFoldersRequiresOrganizerPermissio.description: If true, only users with the organizer role can share folders. If false, users with either the organizer or file organizer role can share folders.

restrictions.description: A set of restrictions to apply to the shared drive.

id.description: The ID of an image file in Google Drive to use for the background image.

width.description: The width of the cropped image (0.0 to 1.0). The height is computed (aspect ratio 80:9).

xCoordinate.description: The X coordinate of the upper left corner of the cropping area in the background image (0.0 to 1.0).

yCoordinate.description: The Y coordinate of the upper left corner of the cropping area in the background image (0.0 to 1.0).

backgroundImageFile.description: An image file and cropping parameters for the shared drive's background. Cannot be set if themeId is set.

useDomainAdminAccess.description: If set to true, the request is issued as a domain administrator.
